tests.title: the arXiv bundle externalizes every tikz diagram to a precompiled PDF figure, with no tikz source remaining
errors: Error: Inline tikz source survives in 1 bundled .tex file(s) — the diagrams were NOT externalized to PDF figures, so the bundle ships the tikz toolchain dependency to arXiv (which does no tikz compilation). Offenders: arxiv-bundle/main.tex [\begin{tikzpicture}, \begin{tikzcd}].
